allow: PowerShell($base = "c:\\Users\\nicolas\\Documents\\dev\\Nosgoth\\new\\template\\nosgoth-site-v5-bgfix2\\nosgoth-dist"; $dest = "$base\\_versions\\header-version"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$dest\\css" | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$dest\\js" | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$base\\css\\main.css" "$dest\\css\\main.css"; Copy-Item "$base\\css\\transitions.css" "$dest\\css\\transitions.css"; Copy-Item "$base\\css\\pages.css" "$dest\\css\\pages.css"; Copy-Item "$base\\js\\layout.js" "$dest\\js\\layout.js"; Write-Host "Backup done: $dest")

PowerShell($src = "c:\\Users\\nicolas\\Documents\\dev\\Nosgoth\\new\\template\\nosgoth-site-v5-bgfix2\\nosgoth-dist\\assets\\icons"; $icons = @\("BO1","SR1","SR2","BO2","DEF","ASC"\); foreach \($i in $icons\) { magick "$src\\$i.png" -resize 128x128 -quality 88 "$src\\$i.webp"; Write-Host "Converted $i.png -> $i.webp" }; magick "$src\\DEF_REM.png" -resize 128x128 -quality 88 "$src\\DEF_REM.webp"; magick "$src\\SR12_REM.png" -resize 128x128 -quality 88 "$src\\SR12_REM.webp"; Write-Host "Done")
